analysis.summary: Odoo is a comprehensive open-source enterprise resource planning (ERP) system that provides a suite of integrated business applications including CRM, eCommerce, accounting, inventory management, and project management through a modular addon architecture.
capabilities: Provides OAuth2 authentication integration with external providers (addons/auth_oauth/controllers/main.py)
Implements WebAuthn/passkey authentication for passwordless login (addons/auth_passkey/controllers/main.py)
Handles user registration, password reset, and signup workflows (addons/auth_signup/controllers/main.py)
Manages business accounting operations including invoicing and financial reporting (addons/account/)
Processes HTTP requests through web controllers with session management (multiple controller files)
Supports multi-database operations with database filtering and selection
Provides REST API endpoints through JSON-RPC protocol
Implements modular addon system for extending functionality (46+ addon directories)
technical_stack: Werkzeug web framework (import statements in controllers)
integrations: OAuth2 providers (Google, Facebook, etc.) via auth_oauth addon

technical_facts: Provides OAuth2 authentication integration with external providers (addons/auth_oauth/controllers/main.py)
Implements WebAuthn/passkey authentication for passwordless login (addons/auth_passkey/controllers/main.py)
Handles user registration, password reset, and signup workflows (addons/auth_signup/controllers/main.py)
Manages business accounting operations including invoicing and financial reporting (addons/account/)
Processes HTTP requests through web controllers with session management (multiple controller files)
Supports multi-database operations with database filtering and selection
Provides REST API endpoints through JSON-RPC protocol
Implements modular addon system for extending functionality (46+ addon directories)

architecture_patterns: Concurrency: gevent-based async processing with greenlet coroutines

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: Implements modular addon system for extending functionality (46+ addon directories), manages business accounting operations including invoicing and financial reporting, and processes HTTP requests through web controllers with session management
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: Uses PostgreSQL database (implied from ORM patterns), manages business accounting operations with structured financial data, and implements JSON-RPC protocol for API endpoints
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: Manages business accounting operations including invoicing and financial reporting (addons/account/), handles user registration, password reset, and signup workflows, and supports multi-database operations with database filtering and selection
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: Uses PostgreSQL database for business accounting operations and financial reporting, requires data consistency for financial transactions and multi-database operations
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High confidence due to modular addon architecture (46+ addon directories) that allows extending functionality, comprehensive authentication systems (OAuth2, WebAuthn, traditional), and well-defined API endpoints. The ERP core can be adapted to various business domains by leveraging its orchestration patterns.

evidence_claims.claim: Implements modular addon system for extensibility
evidence_claims.evidence: Implements modular addon system for extending functionality (46+ addon directories)

Provides OAuth2 authentication integration with external providers (addons/auth_oauth/controllers/main.py), Implements WebAuthn/passkey authentication for passwordless login (addons/auth_passkey/controllers/main.py)
Python 3.10+ (requirements.txt, multiple .py files), Werkzeug web framework (import statements in controllers)
POST /auth_oauth/signin OAuth2 authentication callback (addons/auth_oauth/controllers/main.py:145), GET /web/login User login page (addons/auth_signup/controllers/main.py:21)
